user.title: Bosch eBike Flow Login
user.description:
Open the link below to log in with your Bosch / SingleKey ID account:

**[Log in to Bosch eBike Flow]({auth_url})**

After logging in, the browser will show a page that tries (and fails) to open the eBike app. You will need the **authorization code** from that page — see the next step for how to find it.

Click **Submit** once you have logged in.

code.title: Enter Authorization Code
code.description:
After logging in, find the authorization code using one of these methods:

1. **View Page Source** (Ctrl+U / Cmd+U) — look for `name="code" value="..."` and copy the value
2. **Browser Console** (F12 → Console) — paste: `document.querySelector('input[name=code]').value`
3. **Address bar** — if your browser shows the redirect URL, copy the full URL or just the `code=` value

Paste the code (or full redirect URL) below.

data_description.code: The authorization code from the login page, or the full redirect URL

error.invalid_code: Could not find an authorization code in the input.
error.token_exchange_failed: Failed to exchange the code for a token. The code may have expired — please try again.
error.api_error: Authenticated successfully but could not connect to the Bosch eBike API.
